## Part 2: Comprehensive Over-Engineering Debt Ledger

Since no `// ponytail:` comments exist yet, this ledger catalogs the architectural over-engineering, unnecessary speculative layers (`yagni:`), redundant abstractions, and shrink/delete opportunities discovered during the `/ponytail-review` and `/ponytail-audit` at full intensity. 

### Summary Metrics
- **Speculative Layers & Wrappers (`yagni:`):** 11 components (including 9 Clean Architecture `UseCase` classes + `PlayerAction` dispatch layer + `MediaRepository` interface)
- **Dead Code (`delete:`):** 1 full composable file (`PlayerVideo.kt`)
- **Standard Library / Utility Duplication (`stdlib:` / `shrink:`):** 1 duplicate time formatting function (`formatMs`)
- **Gesture Indirection (`yagni:`):** 11 indirection hops from raw touch event to `MPVLib` invocation

---

### Detailed Debt Catalog by Category

#### 1. Dead Code (`delete:`)
| File Path | Line / Target | Description | Recommended Action |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `player/playback/PlayerVideo.kt` | Entire file (`L1-21`) | Dead `@Composable fun PlayerVideo(viewModel: PlayerViewModel)`. Never called or referenced anywhere in the application. `SurfaceView` / `AndroidView` creation is handled inline inside `PlayerScreen.kt` and `PlayerActivity.kt`. | **Delete file** (`delete:`). |

#### 2. Speculative Layers & Pass-Through Wrappers (`yagni:`)
| File / Component | Target | Description | Recommended Action |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `player/domain/usecase/TogglePlaybackUseCase.kt` | `L1-12` | 1-line wrapper (`playbackCoordinator.togglePlay()`). Adds zero logic, validation, or transformation. | **Inline & Delete (`yagni:`)**. Call `PlaybackCoordinator` directly from `PlayerViewModel`. |
| `player/domain/usecase/SeekUseCase.kt` | `L1-12` | 1-line wrapper (`playbackCoordinator.seek(deltaMs)`). | **Inline & Delete (`yagni:`)**. |
| `player/domain/usecase/SetSubtitleTrackUseCase.kt` | `L1-12` | 1-line wrapper (`trackCoordinator.setSubtitleTrack(id)`). | **Inline & Delete (`yagni:`)**. |
| `player/domain/usecase/SetAudioTrackUseCase.kt` | `L1-12` | 1-line wrapper (`trackCoordinator.setAudioTrack(id)`). | **Inline & Delete (`yagni:`)**. |
| `player/domain/usecase/SetSpeedUseCase.kt` | `L1-12` | 1-line wrapper (`playbackCoordinator.setSpeed(speed)`). | **Inline & Delete (`yagni:`)**. |
| `player/domain/usecase/SaveResumePositionUseCase.kt` | `L1-12` | 1-line wrapper (`resumePositionManager.save(path, posMs)`). | **Inline & Delete (`yagni:`)**. |
| `player/domain/usecase/GetResumePositionUseCase.kt` | `L1-12` | 1-line wrapper (`resumePositionManager.get(path)`). | **Inline & Delete (`yagni:`)**. |
| `player/domain/usecase/LoadMediaUseCase.kt` | `L1-12` | 1-line wrapper (`playbackCoordinator.loadFile(uri)`). | **Inline & Delete (`yagni:`)**. |
| `player/domain/usecase/CycleAspectRatioUseCase.kt` | `L1-12` | 1-line wrapper (`playbackCoordinator.cycleAspectRatio()`). | **Inline & Delete (`yagni:`)**. |
| `di/UseCaseModule.kt` | `L1-61` | Dagger/Hilt module solely dedicated to instantiating the 9 pass-through `UseCase` classes above. | **Delete file (`yagni:`)** alongside the use cases. |
| `player/domain/repository/MediaRepository.kt`<br>`player/domain/repository/LocalMediaRepository.kt` | Interface & Implementation | Single-implementation repository wrapping static `UriResolver.resolveUri(context, uri)` and `PlaylistManager`. Adds an interface hierarchy (`MediaRepository`) where direct usage of `UriResolver` and `PlaylistManager` (which is already injected into `LocalMediaRepository`) would suffice. | **Simplify (`yagni:`)**. Remove `MediaRepository` interface and inject `UriResolver` / `PlaylistManager` directly where needed. |
| `player/engine/PlayerAction.kt`<br>`player/engine/PlayerEngine.kt` (`dispatch`) | `PlayerAction` sealed interface (`L1-118`) & `dispatch` (`L182-224`) | `PlayerAction` wraps every UI command into a sealed data class instance, only for `PlayerEngine.dispatch()` to immediately unwrap it via a 45-line `when` expression and forward it to `PlaybackCoordinator`, `TrackCoordinator`, or `PlaylistManager`. Meanwhile, `PlayerViewModel` injects both `PlayerEngine` *and* 9 `UseCases` (`SeekUseCase`, `TogglePlaybackUseCase`, etc.), creating two competing pass-through paths for the same actions. | **Collapse (`yagni:`)**. Remove `PlayerAction` sealed hierarchy and `dispatch()` switch; have `PlayerViewModel` call `PlaybackCoordinator` and `TrackCoordinator` methods directly. |

#### 3. Standard Library / Utility Duplication (`stdlib:` / `shrink:`)
| File / Component | Target | Description | Recommended Action |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `player/controls/PlayerBottomControls.kt` vs `util/TimeFormatter.kt` | `PlayerBottomControls.kt:L268-288` (`private fun formatMs`) vs `TimeFormatter.kt:L4-7` | `TimeFormatter.kt` defines a clean, shared object `TimeFormatter.formatMs(ms: Long)`. However, `PlayerBottomControls.kt` ignores it and implements a private 21-line `formatMs` function with identical formatting logic (`%02d:%02d` / `%d:%02d:%02d`). | **Replace with `TimeFormatter.formatMs` (`shrink:`)** and delete duplicate private function. |

#### 4. Gesture & Controls Abstraction Indirection (`yagni:`)
| Component Chain | Target | Description | Recommended Action |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Gesture Processing Chain (`GestureHandler.kt` -> `MpvGestureStateMachine.kt` -> `GestureModels.kt` -> `GestureIntent.kt` -> `PlayerOverlay.kt` -> `PlayerScreen.kt` -> `PlayerActivity.kt` -> `PlayerViewModel.kt`) | 11 hops from touch event to engine execution | When a user drags or taps: `GestureHandler` -> `MpvGestureStateMachine` -> `MpvPlayerController` interface -> creates `GestureIntent` -> `onGestureIntent` callback -> `PlayerOverlay` wrapper -> `PlayerScreen` wrapper -> `PlayerActivity` (`viewModel.submitGestureIntent(intent)`) -> `_gestureIntents` flow -> `PlayerViewModel` coroutine -> maps to either `UseCase` wrapper OR `PlayerAction` data class -> `PlayerEngine.dispatch` -> `PlaybackCoordinator` -> `MpvCommandExecutor` -> `MPVLib`. | **Prune callback and forwarding hops (`yagni:`)**. Direct wiring from `PlayerOverlay` / `PlayerScreen` to `PlayerViewModel` coordinators cuts out 6+ unnecessary translation layers without sacrificing UI responsiveness or testability. |
